projects.title: Torbellino
projects.subtitle: A sensorial light installation that reveals invisible energies.
projects.description: An interactive installation and visual spectacle that invites participants into a sensory space where the invisible becomes perceptible. Through fabrics, airflow, and projected lights, the work makes unseen energies reachable.
projects.footer:
Created in collaboration with the students of the Master in Interactive Design & Extended Realities.
Torbellino is a project of IED
Exhibited at the MIRA FESTIVAL 2025.

projects.title: Joystick
projects.subtitle: A Joystick to remote control (almost) anything.
projects.description:
Joystick is a modular system that allows a user to remotely control things.Plug anything in and you can control it with the joystick.
We're used to this type of controllers as a way to interact with arcade games and have fun experiences. Here, this projects takes advantage of those expectations by transforming your interaction with everyday objects into a playful experience, rendering whatever objects are plugged in part of your game.
projects.footer: Project developed with the support of the team at FABLAB Barcelona.

projects.title: SuperBarrio
projects.subtitle: A videogame to engage citizens in designing their public spaces.
projects.description:
Superbarrio is a game designed to boost participatory design. It makes use gamification strategies to engage the citizens in the design of their own public space.

As an open-source tool, Superbarrio widens the potential audience of participatory design processes, overcoming the limits of conventional methodologies.
projects.footer:
Created in collaboration with the students of the Master in Cities and Technology 2017.
SuperBarrio is a project of IaaC, Institute for Advanced Architecture of Catalonia.

projects.title: Metronomy Pinball Machine
projects.subtitle: The retro pinball machine that recreates a Metronomy tune.
projects.description:
Inspired by the retro feel of the Metronomy album: Summer 08, we designed a custom pinball machine that has each of its bumpers, paddles and walls playing stems from their hit song: Old Skool.
As the game is played, each player creates their own version of the Metronomy tune
projects.footer:
Created in Collaboration with Persiis Hajiyanni
Sound Design by Stefan Iyapah
Exhibited at the 'Metronomy - Summer 08 ' album launch - Sonos Studios, London.

projects.title: Je suis qui je suis
projects.subtitle: An interactive installation that lets you play with your own shadow.
projects.description:
An interactive projection that engages the visitors by surprising them with a second shadow projected on the wall behind them with a slight delay.
This allows the audience to participate in an unusual and playful dialogue with their own shadow.
projects.footer:
Created in Collaboration with Persiis Hajiyanni and Stefan Iyapah
Exhibited at the Palais De Tokyo - Paris for the 2016 DO DISTURB! Festival

projects.title: Meeting Intruders
projects.subtitle: A chrome extension that makes never-ending meetings a little more fun.
projects.description:
Meetings: Useful? Absolutely. Boring? Wellll, meetings are rarely the highlight of anyone’s day. And that was before 2020 kicked in, turning meetings into a nonstop Zoom-athon of home-based enterprise.

Meeting intruders is a fun, private, distracting escape that lets you grin your way through meetings and leaves your colleagues none the wiser.
As soon as you start, you’ll know what to do.

Try it out on the Google Play Store
projects.footer:
Winner of a FWA award,
Created in collaboration with the team at B-Reel Barcelona

projects.title: DRI.VR
projects.subtitle: A VR experience that lets you be at the wheel of a toy remote control car.
projects.description:
Virtual Reality offers the possibility to access the macroscopic and the microscopic and to see and feel things in ways never possible before.

DRI.VR takes advantage of this in a fun way, offering a playful experience that will change your perspective and really make you feel small.
projects.footer: Exhibited at the Central Saint Martins Degree Show 2015, London.

projects.title: Inside
projects.subtitle: An immersive musical journey from the insides of a guitar.
projects.description:
This immersive work demonstrated the power of VR by letting us experience music in a completely different way than we could before:

The beauty of the guitar's architecture is highlighted as each note warmly reverberates off the walls, while the strings vibrate in realtime to the sound of the instrument being played, offering a holistic experience to the user.
projects.footer:
Created in collaboration with Sofia Aronov. Music by Stefan Iyapah.
Exhibited at the Lethaby Gallery 20, London.

projects.title: Alier
projects.subtitle: An interactive game to promote Alier's paper recycling services
projects.description: This gamified interaction enabled visitors to understand the services & products of the company. The Leap motion, a hand tracking device, helped engage the users in an intuitive and accessible way and made the game even more fun.
projects.footer:
Made in collaboration with Manuela Pereira.
Exhibited at the Global Gypsum Conference 2022, Lisbon.
